reason: Contains ISIS terminology including 'Wilayat' (province), 'Khilafah' (caliphate), and uses derogatory term 'Safavid' (Safawi) to refer to Iraqi forces, which is common ISIS rhetoric. Reports military attack in ISIS operational style.
